title: Step 2: Logger (slog + lipgloss) + terminal output modes
description: implement internal/log package with slog text/JSON handlers, lipgloss styling, TTY detection, NO_COLOR/CI support

title: Step 3: Config system (koanf) with layered precedence
description: Implement internal/config package with koanf layered loading and wire config commands

title: Step 4: State manager — run directories + lifecycle markers
description: Create internal/state package with RunDir, lifecycle markers, currentRunRef, gitignore init, and wire forge status

title: Step 5: Single-run lock with PID + start-time tuple
description: Implement internal/state/lock package, wire into CLI, write tests

title: Step 6: Git helper (shell-out wrapper)
description: internal/git package with all operations + forge doctor partial wiring

title: Step 7: Process wrapper
description: internal/proc package with cross-platform subprocess tree-kill, graceful termination, external-signal classification, and I/O tee with ring buffer

title: Step 8: Backend interface + fake-backend test binary
description: Define Backend interface in internal/backend, implement cmd/fake-backend with text/stream-json/acp modes

title: Implement Step 10: Intent Router

title: Step 12: Loop Engine — minimal Ralph loop
description: Implement internal/loopengine package with ledger, prompt assembly, git commit, TASK_COMPLETE detection, max_iterations cap, and wire into CLI

title: Step 13: Policy scanners — Security + Placeholder + Gate
description: Implement internal/policy package with gitleaks security scanner, placeholder regex scanner, and file-path gate scanner; wire into loop engine before commit

title: Step 14: Escalation Manager — mailbox pair + fsnotify
description: internal/escalate package: awaiting-human.md write, answer.md watch+parse, debounce, network-FS fallback, loop integration

title: Step 15: Notifier — 5-channel cascade + env-probe
description: Implement internal/notify package with FileSink, BannerSink, OSCSink, TmuxSink, BeepSink; wire into EscalationManager; add env-probe to forge doctor

title: Step 16: Stuck Detector + Completion Detector
description: Implement internal/stuckdet and internal/compdet packages, extend LedgerEntry, wire into loop engine

title: Step 17: Context Manager + Brain primitives
description: internal/context and internal/brain packages; wire to loop engine

title: Step 18: Gemini + Kiro backend adapters
description: Implement internal/backend/gemini and internal/backend/kiro adapters with tests; wire into CLI

title: Step 19: Add/Fix/Refactor brownfield loop paths
description: Extend planphase research/artifacts/gates for Add/Fix/Refactor; add path-specific completion criteria in compdet

title: Step 20: One-shot modes (Review/Document/Explain/Research)
description: Implement internal/oneshot package + wire into CLI router

title: Step 21: Upgrade mode (dep-gate-inverted loop)
description: Implement Upgrade mode with dep-gate inversion, pre-loop confirmation, upgrade-scope.md artifact, and path criteria check

title: Step 22: Test mode (scope-restricted loop with production-touch escalation)
description: planphase Test research+artifact, loopengine production-touch escalation, compdet test criteria

title: Implement Step 23: Composite chaining package + wiring

title: Step 25: CI + release pipeline + distribution
